title: astragalus adulterinus
intro: Astragalus adulterinus, also known as the adulterous goat's-thorn or the Mexican milk-vetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Astragalus adulterinus are attributed to its ability to reduce stress and fatigue, improve respiratory function, and increase the body's ability to fight off infections. Astragalus adulterinus can be prepared into various herbal products, including capsules, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and prevent illness.
